name: Eye of Sin
desc: An additional eye opens on your body. You can see the invisible, but attract the attention of entities.
benefit: Constant supernatural perception

name: Necrotic Touch
desc: Your skin darkens and hardens. Your touch causes pain, but you feel less.
benefit: +1 die on intimidation rolls

name: Tongue of the Abyss
desc: You involuntarily speak in infernal tongues.
penalty: Reveals your position at critical moments
benefit: Can understand any creature

name: Bloodthirst
desc: An insatiable hunger for human flesh grows inside you.
penalty: Must resist or attack the nearest person
benefit: +1d6 on melee attacks

name: Mark of Damnation
desc: Black runes burn on your skin.
benefit: May spend Stress to activate Blasphemies without cost

name: Eyes: Zoom Vision
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: You can see clearly at an extreme distance, as if you could 'zoom in' your vision.

name: Eyes: X-Ray Vision
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: You can see through walls and non-living matter at a short distance.

name: Eyes: Emotion Sensor
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: When closed, you can sense the emotional state of nearby humans or exorcists. Once per mission, gain +1D or power when acting with this aid.

name: Eyes: Paralyzing Gaze
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: Once per mission, you can momentarily paralyze a human simply by looking at them. Effect lasts until eye contact is broken, a minute passes, or they suffer stress.

name: Eyes: Night Vision
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: You can see clearly in the dark and are not affected by darkness, weather, or obscurement.

name: Eyes: Enhanced Focus
desc: Black/altered sclera, white iris, split/cut/duplicated pupils.
benefit: Gain +1D base on all skills. This can give you up to 4D.

name: Jaw: Black Venom
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: You can spit black venom at close range. It is a mundane ranged weapon with effectiveness similar to a pistol.

name: Jaw: Voice of the Abyss
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: You can gain 1d3 sin to reroll any test requiring speech, considering the second result as final.

name: Jaw: Whisper to the Wind
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: You can whisper short messages (up to 6 words) to the wind that a chosen distant target can hear (without replying).

name: Jaw: Supernatural Gab
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: You gain +1D when negotiating, commanding, or convincing humans.

name: Jaw: Absolute Command
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: Once per mission, you can give a one-word command to a human, who will attempt to follow it (as long as it is not harmful).

name: Jaw: Uncontested Authority
desc: Split/extended jaw, pharyngeal jaw, fangs, black tongue, viscous saliva.
benefit: Gain +1D base on all skills. This can give you up to 4D.

name: Back/Chest: Deep Rest
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: You can roll an extra rest die when resting. If you do, you gain the same amount as sin.

name: Back/Chest: Biological Immunity
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: You no longer need to breathe and are immune to mundane toxins and poisons. Cannot get intoxicated by alcohol.

name: Back/Chest: PK Expansion
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: Gain +1 maximum PK.

name: Back/Chest: Flesh Luck
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: Chance to ignore any wound (roll a d6, ignore the wound on a 6).

name: Back/Chest: Supernatural Relief
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: Automatically clear 1 stress when pressure increases.

name: Back/Chest: Physical Vigor
desc: Spines, lesions, discoloration, rapid regeneration, hardened/loose skin, vestigial wings, extra ribs.
benefit: Gain +1D base on all skills. This can give you up to 4D.

name: Hands/Arms: Excessive Strength
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: You can gain 1d3 sin to perform a mundane physical feat to increase the feat's CAT by +2.

name: Hands/Arms: Incorporation
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: Once per mission, you can fuse any mundane weapon/item you hold into your flesh, concealing or drawing it at will.

name: Hands/Arms: Touch of Dissolution
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: Once per mission, can dissolve non-living matter in a cube of size 1/2 CAT into black mud with a ring finger touch.

name: Hands/Arms: Biological Weapon
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: Once per mission, gain 1d3 sin to transform your arm/hand into a melee weapon for one scene (supernatural CAT 1/2).

name: Hands/Arms: Second Chance
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: Can reroll any strength or interface roll (second result is final), gaining 1d3 sin.

name: Hands/Arms: Physical Fortification
desc: Claws, split hand, extra arm, distorted skin/muscles, discoloration, extra fingers.
benefit: Gain +1D base on all skills. This can give you up to 4D.

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Boosted Jump
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: You can gain 1d3 sin to jump the equivalent of an object of your CAT size without rolling (as part of an action).

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Arachnid Climbing
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: While touching with direct skin contact, you can climb or walk on walls as if they were flat surfaces.

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Road Speed
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: You have +1D when running on open terrain, such as a road.

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Glide
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: You can gain 1 sin during a roll to glide a long distance in the air (must be on high ground).

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Full Camouflage
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: You can gain 1d3 sin to become completely invisible to mundane perception for the duration of one action roll.

name: Skin/Hair/Legs: Invisible Cloak
desc: Severe discoloration/bleaching, transparent skin, digitigrade/multi-legged deformity, hair color change.
benefit: Gain +1D base on all skills. This can give you up to 4D.
